paths.node:fs: Tauri WebView cannot run Node modules -- use Tauri commands (invoke) for filesystem access.
paths.node:fs/promises: Tauri WebView cannot run Node modules -- use Tauri commands (invoke) for filesystem access.
paths.node:path: Tauri WebView cannot run Node modules -- use @tauri-apps/api/path.
paths.node:os: Tauri WebView cannot run Node modules -- use @tauri-apps/api/os.
paths.node:crypto: Tauri WebView cannot run Node modules -- use globalThis.crypto.subtle.
paths.node:child_process: Tauri WebView cannot spawn processes -- use Tauri commands.
paths.node:stream: Tauri WebView cannot run Node modules -- use Web Streams.
paths.node:util: Tauri WebView cannot run Node modules.
paths.node:events: Tauri WebView cannot run Node modules -- use EventTarget.
paths.node:buffer: Tauri WebView cannot run Node modules -- use Uint8Array.
paths.@founder-os/prompt-master/node: The /node entry point pulls in Node-only deps. Desktop app uses the client-safe barrel: import from @founder-os/prompt-master only.
paths.@founder-os/sales-agents/node: The /node entry point pulls in pdfkit + node:fs. Desktop app uses the client-safe barrel: import from @founder-os/sales-agents only.
paths.@founder-os/media-providers/node: The /node entry point spawns the HyperFrames CLI via node:child_process. Desktop app cannot spawn from the WebView -- invoke a Tauri command instead, or import from @founder-os/media-providers (client-safe barrel) for stub providers and types only.
paths.@founder-os/crm-providers/node: The /node entry point makes localhost HTTP calls + spawns docker via node:child_process. Desktop app cannot do either from the WebView -- invoke a Tauri command instead, or import from @founder-os/crm-providers (client-safe barrel) for types + stub providers only.
paths.@founder-os/handoff-providers/node: The /node entry point spawns the Open CoDesign Electron binary via node:child_process. Desktop app cannot spawn from the WebView -- invoke a Tauri command (codesign_probe / codesign_spawn) instead, or import from @founder-os/handoff-providers (client-safe barrel) for capabilities, schemas, and the pure prompt builder.
paths.@founder-os/backend-providers/node: The /node entry point spawns the PocketBase binary via node:child_process and hits the admin REST API. Desktop app cannot do either from the WebView -- invoke a Tauri command (backend_probe_pocketbase / backend_serve_dev) instead, or import from @founder-os/backend-providers (client-safe barrel) for capabilities, stub providers, and the probe-result envelope.
paths.@founder-os/media-edit-providers/node: The /node entry point spawns the Bun runtime via node:child_process. Desktop app cannot spawn from the WebView -- invoke a Tauri command instead, or import from @founder-os/media-edit-providers (client-safe barrel) for the config_only provider, capabilities, and types.
paths.@founder-os/social-providers/node: The /node entry point spawns the social-poster CLI via node:child_process and writes drafts/results to disk via node:fs/promises. Desktop app cannot do either from the WebView -- invoke a Tauri command instead, or import from @founder-os/social-providers (client-safe barrel) for capabilities, the probe-result envelope, and the BrightBean / TryPost stub providers.
paths.@founder-os/handoff-pack-providers/node: The /node entry point writes brand assets and PDFs via node:fs / node:path. Desktop app cannot touch disk from the WebView -- invoke a Tauri command (handoff_pack_prepare_brand_assets / handoff_pack_render_pdf) instead, or import from @founder-os/handoff-pack-providers (client-safe barrel) for the PdfEngine contract, the Handlebars-subset template engine, the markdown converter, and the brand-CSS wrapper.
paths.@founder-os/import-core/node: The /node entry point streams sha256 via node:crypto and stages files via node:fs/promises. Desktop app cannot touch disk or run Node crypto from the WebView -- invoke a Tauri command (vault_hash_file / vault_stage_original) instead, or import from @founder-os/import-core (client-safe barrel) for the orchestrator, ports, and lifecycle state machine.
paths.@founder-os/local-file-importer/node: The /node entry point walks the filesystem with node:fs/promises. Desktop app cannot touch disk from the WebView -- invoke a Tauri command instead, or import from @founder-os/local-file-importer (client-safe barrel) for the ingest orchestrator + port types.
paths.@founder-os/document-extractor/node: The /node entry point loads pdfjs-dist + mammoth via dynamic imports that pull in node:fs internals. Desktop app cannot run them from the WebView -- invoke a Tauri command instead, or import from @founder-os/document-extractor (client-safe barrel) for the pure extractors (md/text/html/csv/json), the PdfTextExtractor / DocxTextExtractor ports, and the noop stubs.
